models.name: gpt-oss-20b
models.notes: Best first model: ~12 GB on disk, comfortable on 8 GB RAM.

models.name: gpt-oss-120b
models.notes: ~62 GB on disk; needs ~75 GB free during conversion. Slow but mighty.

models.name: mixtral-8x7b-instruct
models.notes: Mixtral family (requantized to int4). Architecture is CI-validated on synthetic weights; real-weights reports welcome.
